name: com.cupkekgames.data
description: Data foundation for CupkekGames packages: IData / DataSO / asset catalog, primitive implementations, and drop-table utilities. Serialization-agnostic and UI-free. Pair with com.cupkekgames.gamesave for save management, com.cupkekgames.newtonsoft for JSON persistence, com.cupkekgames.servicelocator for runtime registration.
